ddls:
CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_code" INTEGER /* Internal code assigned to the format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., XLSX, XLSM) */,
  "importance_level" INTEGER /* Level of importance for the format (1-5) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Special notes or considerations for the format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the format (e.g., .xlsx, .xlsm) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the format details were updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format is deprecated and no longer supported */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compatibility issues with other systems or applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formats_importance_level FOREIGN KEY ("importance_level") REFERENCES importance_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library (e.g., js-xlsx, js-xls) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library's functionality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the library details were updated */,
  "is_os_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the library is supported on the company's operating system */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0) */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the library's documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support association */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "support_level" TEXT /* Level of support for the format (e.g., strict, basic) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the support details */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the library is the default choice for the format */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* The last date the support level was tested */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the latest support tests */,
  "support_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on support details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_support_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_support_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "importance_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each importance level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the importance level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the format has been used */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the format was last used */,
  "average_usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Average number of times the format is used per day */,
  "last_month_usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the format was used in the last month */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* The last date the usage statistics were tested */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the latest usage tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_support" (
  "app_support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application support record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of support (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the support status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format is the default choice for the application */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* The last date the support status was tested */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the latest support tests */,
  "support_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on support details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_support_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)
